$schema: Features registry for terrain-gen-rust. Agents MUST NOT mark a feature 'passing' without cargo test --lib succeeding. Update 'last_verified' with date and seed when checking.

terrain_generation.description: Noise-based terrain pipeline (fBm -> erosion -> hydrology -> biomes -> soil -> resources)
known_issues: Terrain enum has 26 variants with 10+ match blocks — should use data-driven TerrainDef structs
features.json test_count was 25; actual grep count is 23 (terrain_gen.rs:6 + terrain_pipeline.rs:17)

analytical_erosion.description: Stream Power Law (SPL) closed-form erosion: K * A^m * S^n

pipe_water.description: Pipe model water simulation (O'Brien 1995 / Stam GDC 2008), 8-directional flux with sediment transport
known_issues: Research prototype — volume conservation not extensively tested

simulation_water.description: Legacy WaterMap heightfield model — still runs for moisture but should be replaced by PipeWater
known_issues: THREE water systems exist (WaterMap, PipeWater, Terrain::Water) — should be ONE (PipeWater)
0D refactor (Stages 1-4) introduced WorldState.water (PipeWater) and unified rendering, but WaterMap still coexists in Game struct (game/mod.rs:396, 431). Cleanup not yet complete.

simulation_moisture.description: MoistureMap — reads from PipeWater + wind, feeds vegetation
known_issues: Moisture decay/persistence rules unclear
Chain: water_surface -> evaporation -> transport -> precipitation -> surface water -> vegetation moisture not fully connected
moisture.rs is 1867 lines — largest simulation module, candidate for split
9 of 18 tests are #[ignore] diagnostic tests — only 9 are regular passing tests

simulation_vegetation.description: VegetationMap — growth/decay based on moisture, soil, season

simulation_wind.description: WindField — Stam fluid solver + curl noise

simulation_scent.description: ScentMap — danger/home scent for creature AI

simulation_traffic.description: TrafficMap — tracks entity movement for auto-road building

simulation_soil_fertility.description: SoilFertilityMap — fertility based on soil type and conditions

known_issues: ExplorationMap reveals 100% of map trivially by tick 6000: initial reveal radius=15 (game/mod.rs:1369) + villager sight_range=22 covers a 70x25 map in ~200 ticks. Fog-of-war not functioning as a meaningful game mechanic — exploration_pct=100.0 in all evaluation seeds.

ecs_core.description: Entity-Component-System: components, AI, movement, hunger, death, farms, breeding, raids
known_issues: ecs/tests.rs is 7164 lines in one file — should be split into focused test modules

VillagerMemory is written (DangerZone, ThreatReport) in systems.rs but never read in ai.rs for decisions — Phase 2 (memory-driven AI) not started; AI still reads global stockpile counts (15 occurrences in ai.rs)

game_loop.description: Game struct, step(), input handling, water cycle, fire, particles
known_issues: game/mod.rs is 2592 lines — grew by ~200 lines with Stage 4 of 0D refactor (WorldState integration). File split was done (input, water_cycle, fire, particles extracted) but mod.rs remains large
fire.rs, water_cycle.rs, particles.rs have 0 tests each
construction_dust_particles_spawn (tests.rs:2840) is a flaky test — 1/4 probability particle spawn over 20 ticks gives ~0.3% false-failure rate; needs more ticks or deterministic seed

building_system.description: Auto-build, building placement, demolish, outposts, influence, traffic
building_system.test_note: Tests live in src/game/tests.rs, counted under game_loop

events.description: Random events: drought, harvest, migration, wolf surge, milestones, threat scaling
known_issues: Drought event structurally impossible at 12K ticks: grain>=pop*5 threshold never met in evaluation runs (Summer just starts at tick 12K)
threat_score now exposed in diagnostics (RESOLVED in commit 8af4abd) — WolfSurge fires for seed 137 at tick 6000; 0/3 seeds see Drought

rendering.description: Terminal rendering: 4 modes (Normal, Map, Landscape, Debug) + overlays
known_issues: Three color truth sources (Terrain::fg/bg, SoilType::ground_fg, vegetation_color_from_conditions) — should be unified
features.json test_count was 62; actual count is 61 (all in render/mod.rs)
render/mod.rs is still 1300 lines after split; render/shared.rs is 865 lines

save_load.description: JSON save/load for game state + ECS world serialization
known_issues: No dedicated unit tests — only implicit coverage via integration tests
Not fully implemented or tested

hydrology.description: Particle-based hydraulic erosion (SimpleHydrology port from Nick McDonald)
known_issues: Not referenced in ARCHITECTURE.md file map
Integration with terrain_pipeline unclear — standalone research module

world_state.description: WorldState struct — canonical simulation state (heights, water, moisture, vegetation, wind). Introduced in 0D architecture refactor Stages 1-4.
known_issues: Not documented in ARCHITECTURE.md or design docs
WaterMap still coexists in Game struct — WorldState.water (PipeWater) should eventually be the only water source
No unit tests — all coverage is indirect through integration tests
State-driven architecture design doc (docs/design/cross_cutting/state_driven_architecture.md) describes the intent but implementation is not complete

status_legend.needs_refactor: Working but code structure needs improvement
